channel.title: RCU on Moe's VR blog
channel.description: Recent content in RCU on Moe's VR blog

item.title: Notes On RCU
item.description: RCU is a mechanism in the Linux kernel for concurrency that is lock-free, wait-free (for readers) and that allows concurrent readers and a single updater. RCU is made up of three fundamental mechanisms, one for insertion, the other for deletion, and the third being used to allow readers to tolerate concurrent insertions and deletions.
